title: Flaky Midnight Craving Saudian Herb Crumble
description: This herbal, flaky dish features smoky paprika and is perfect for a midnight craving in the Arabian cuisine style.

ingredients.name: 1/3 cup cold butter or margarine, cubed
Pinch of salt and black pepper

instructions: Mix flour, baking powder, and optional salt in a large bowl.
Add cubed cold butter or margarine into the dry ingredients and use your fingers to work until you achieve a crumbly texture similar to bread crumbs.
Gradually add water or milk while continuing to mix until dough comes together. The dough should be sticky but not overly wet.
Press the dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, smoothing out any edges if needed. Sprinkle herbs and smoked paprika over the top of the crumble.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the outside. Serve warm as a snack or dessert.
